{{Quote|Are you sure it's okay to be goofin' off like this, Carli? If Giel ever found out...|Scraper|<ref name="marvel65" />}}
'''Scraper''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] was a member of an expedition led by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Mils Giel]] to investigate the formerly [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]]-held [[Golrath Station]]. While slacking from their duties, Scraper and fellow trooper [[Carli]] inadvertently discovered that the stone in the station's walls had unique properties that allowed it to store and replay images of events and information that had happened nearby, potentially meaning that they could reveal vital Rebel secrets. However, a Rebel raid destroyed Golrath Station not long after Scraper's discovery.<ref name="marvel65" />

==Appearances==
